name: Potravwa Zapiekana
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange half the potato slices, fish, cauliflower, and eggs in a greased 1 1/2 quart casserole.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Blend flour into sour cream; stir in water. Spoon over casserole.
4. Add remaining potatoes, fish, cauliflower, and eggs.
5. Mix bread crumbs, cheese, and butter; sprinkle over casserole.
6. Bake for 30 minutes at 350 degrees.
Nutritional info per serving: 391 calories; 19g protein, 29g carbohydrates, 22g fat (51%).
